relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Ananias and Sapphira sell a possession.
A hidden split enters the shared-life offering.
Peter names the lie as heart-space opened to adversarial distortion.
The issue is not required giving, but falsified offering before the Divine.
The lie collapses under the word, and awe spreads.
The younger ones bury Ananias.
Sapphira enters unaware.
She confirms the false agreement.
The testing of Spirit is exposed.
The hidden agreement completes its consequence.
Awe falls upon the whole assembly.
Signs and wonders move through apostolic hands in one accord.
The people magnify them with reverent distance.
More trusting ones are added, men and women.
Even shadow becomes a symbol of healing expectation.
The weak and spirit-troubled are brought, and all are healed.
Jealousy rises in religious power.
The apostles are placed in public custody.
A messenger opens the prison in the night.
They are sent back to speak all the words of this life.
At daybreak they teach in the temple while the council seeks them in prison.
The officers find no prisoners.
Locked doors and standing guards cannot explain absence.
The authorities become perplexed.
The prisoners are found teaching in the temple.
They are brought without force because the people are feared.
They stand again before the council.
The name and the teaching have filled Jerusalem.
Obedience to the Divine outranks human prohibition.
The raised Jesus is proclaimed against the killing tree.
Exalted Leader and Savior gives turning and release.
The apostles and holy Spirit bear witness together.
The word cuts through and provokes death-intent.
Gamaliel rises with measured caution.
Israel’s leaders are warned to take care.
Theudas becomes an example of failed human movement.
Judas the Galilean becomes another scattered movement.
Human counsel will collapse on its own.
Divine work cannot be overthrown; opposing it risks fighting the Divine.
They are beaten and threatened again about the name.
The apostles leave rejoicing to suffer dishonor for the Name.
Temple and house become daily spaces of Messiah good news.
